title: Ssense DPDP Compliance Audit Result
description: Deterministic legal audit output bridging the SLM reasoning engine to the Rust network interceptor.

global_legal_reasoning.description: Chain-of-thought reasoning analyzing the policy text against the DPDP Act and 2025 Rules before any conclusions are made.

violations.description: Specific statutory violations detected, coupled directly with their mechanical enforcement actions.

statute_reference.description: The exact Section or Rule violated (e.g., 'DPDP Act Sec 8(7)', 'DPDP Rules 2025 Rule 8(3)').

evidence_quote.description: The exact verbatim string extracted from the scraped privacy policy proving the violation.

offending_entities.description: Specific targets for the network action. Empty array if WARN_USER_ONLY.

dpdp_trust_score.description: Final compliance score from 0 (malicious) to 100 (perfectly compliant).
